rows.title: Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 NCLT admitted Canara Bank’s Section 7 petition against HK Toll Road on June 11, 2026 for Rs282.60 crore.

Board Meeting Intimation for Intimation Of Board Meeting Under Regulation 29 Of SEBI (Listing Obligation And Disclosure Requirements) 
Regulation, 2015. Board to consider SME-to-Main Board migration a
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Award_of_Order_Receipt_of_Order NCLT sanctioned Sonata Software’s amalgamation with Encore I.T. Services Solutions on 5 June 2026.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment Motisons Jewellers allotted 13.57 crore shares via QIP at ₹11.05, raising ₹150 crore on June 11, 2026.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Resignation of Statutory Auditors DMKH & Co. resigned as statutory auditor effective 8 June 2026; board noted it on 11 June.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition AdaniConneX acquired 100% stake in Madhuvanti Build Estate for ₹765.25 crore.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Updates on Acquisition JK Paper acquired 15.40% more BPPL shares on 11 June 2026, raising stake to 87.36%.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release Sagility acquires U.S.-based CareSeed; 100% deal expected to close June 11, 2026.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment Allotted 68,75,92,710 rights shares at Rs 1.45 each; paid-up capital rises to 175,52,83,254.

Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of The Board Meeting- Pursuant To Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015. Board approved 8 Jul 2026 AGM, auditor appointment, ₹20 Cr authorised capital, a
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Acquisition Sagility LLC signed agreement to acquire CareSeed LLC for up to US$30 million.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Resignation of Director Three independent directors resigned on June 11, 2026, from board and committees.
Resignation Mr. Avula Hariprasad resigned as CFO effective June 11, 2026.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Resignation of Director Four independent directors resigned from Oswal Greentech on June 11, 2026, including key committee chairpersons.
Announcement Under Regulation 30 Of Listing Regulations USFDA issued Import Alert 66-40 on June 10, 2026 for Dabur's Silvassa plant.

Board Meeting Intimation for Intimation Of (3/2026-27) Meeting Of Board Of The Company Under Regulation 29 Of SEBI (LODR) Regulations, 2015 Board meets on 16 June 2026 to consider rights issue terms a
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Press Release / Media Release Anupam Rasayan commercialises ETFA on June 11, 2026, becoming first globally using flow chemistry.
Notice Of NCLT Convened Meeting Of Secured Creditors To Be Held On 17Th July, 2026. NCLT convened secured creditors' meeting on July 17, 2026 for GlobeTF and Estorifi merger into Veefin.
Shareholders meeting EGM on 11 Jun 2026 approved preferential issue of equity shares; resolution passed unanimously.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Scheme of Arrangement NCLT ordered shareholder and creditor meetings for ITSL-ITFSL demerger scheme on 10 June 2026.
Change in Company Secretary/Compliance Officer Board approved Vaibhavi Patel as Company Secretary from June 11, 2026; Puja Mehta resigned.
Intimation Pursuant To Regulation 7(2)(B) Of The SEBI (Prohibition Of Insider Trading) Regulations, 2015 President of India sold 3.77 crore NLC India shares via OFS on June 9-10, 2026.
Shareholder Meeting / Postal Ballot-Notice of Postal Ballot Postal ballot for Nilesh Narwekar reappointment, Sumit Banerjee reappointment, and CEO pay ceiling raised to Rs.70 lakh/month.
General Updates BSE approved direct listing of 20,55,64,890 E2E Networks shares from June 12, 2026.
Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of The Board Meeting Held On June 11, 2026 And Financial Results For The Quarter And Financial Year Ended March 31, 2026 HOEC approved FY26 results; reversed ₹258.78
Board Meeting Outcome for Outcome Of Meeting Of Board Held On June 11, 2026. Board approved QIP closure on June 11, 2026; 13.57 crore shares at ₹11.05 each.
Acquisition Board approved buying remaining 5.74% stake in SERTPL, making it wholly owned within 60 working days.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Change in Directorate Government nominates Shri Sanjay Lohiya as SBI director, effective 11 June 2026, replacing Shri Nagaraju Maddirala.
Outcome of Board Meeting Board approved auditor reappointments and acquisition of remaining 5.74% SERTPL stake, making it wholly owned.
Appointment Amit Mahajan appointed Executive Director/WTD for five years, effective June 11, 2026, subject to shareholder ratification.
Outcome of Board Meeting Board approved 16.85 lakh shares and 13.15 lakh warrants; EGM on 10 July 2026.
Outcome of Board Meeting CDSL appoints Amit Mahajan as Executive Director/WTD for 5 years from June 11, 2026.

Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Change in Directorate Ministry of Power appoints Rajesh Kumar Chandel as Whole-time Director (Projects) for five years; Suprakash Adhikari's additional charge e
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Issue of Securities Board approved rights issue of fully paid equity shares aggregating up to ₹330 crore.
Updates on Open Offer June 11, 2026: zero shares tendered in Emirates NBD’s open offer for 26% of RBL Bank.
Revised Financial Result For For The Year Ended 31St March 2026 Revised FY2025-26 audited results approved; 1:2 bonus shares allotted and luggage division closed.
Acquisition Board on 11 Jun 2026 approved auditor reappointments and acquisition of remaining 5.74% in SERTPL.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Resignation of Company Secretary / Compliance Officer CS and Compliance Officer Lalita Jigar Shah resigned effective 28 May 2026 due to personal reasons.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Resignation of Chief Financial Officer (CFO) Deepak Verma resigned as CFO effective 10 June 2026.
Statement On Impact Of Audit Qualification For The Year Ended 31/03/2026 FY26 audit report qualified; accumulated losses Rs21,295.40 lakh and negative working capital raise going-concern concerns.

Intimation Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI (LODR), Regulations, 2015 - Order Passed By Office Of Estate Officer, Mumbai Port Trust ('MBPT'). MBPT order seeks ₹56.84 crore compensation and ₹79.97 crore
Outcome of Board Meeting 4 lakh equity shares allotted to Dr. Faruk Patel at ₹42.35 on June 11, 2026.
Allotment of Securities Allotted 4,00,000 equity shares to Dr. Faruk Patel at ₹42.35, increasing paid-up capital to 38,72,000 shares.
Deccan Gold Accelerates Kyrgyzstan Gold Project As Production Draws Near Kyrgyzstan Altyn Tor project nears commissioning; production expected as construction reaches near-completion by mid-August.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Allotment Rights committee allotted 2.90 crore partly paid shares on June 11, 2026, doubling equity capital.
Corporate Insolvency Resolution Process (CIRP)-Appointment of Interim Resolution Professional (IRP) NCLT admitted Section 7 CIRP against Oswal Overseas; Mr. Mansij Arya appointed IRP.
Disclosure Under Regulation 30 Of The SEBI ( LODR) Regulations, 2015 ("SEBI Listing Regulations") PCBL commissioned 20,000 MTPA specialty line at Mundra; total specialty capacity rises to 132 KTpa.
Disclosure under Regulation 30A of LODR Promoters signed SPA on June 11, 2026 to sell 70.61% stake at Rs 30 per share; open offer follows.
Announcement under Regulation 30 (LODR)-Open Offer - Updates Promoters signed 11 June 2026 SPA to sell 70.61% stake at Rs 30/share; open offer to follow.

Submission Of Revised Statement On Impact Of Audit Qualifications For The Financial Year Ended March 31, 2026 Revised FY26 audit qualification statement; adverse opinion, no business operations, Canar
